# remnawave_subscription_template (Resource)

Manages a Remnawave subscription template.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "remnawave_subscription_template" "xray" {
  name          = "Default XRAY_JSON"
  template_type = "XRAY_JSON"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Template name (2-255 chars).
- `template_type` (String) Type: XRAY_JSON, XRAY_BASE64, MIHOMO, STASH, CLASH, SINGBOX.

### Optional

- `encoded_template_yaml` (String) Encoded template YAML.
- `template_json` (String) Template JSON (opaque).

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String)
